hero.description: Software Developer & WordPress Developer with hands-on experience building custom websites from scratch. Strong focus on UX/UI, responsive layouts, and performance optimization.

about.subtitle: About Me
about.title: Technical Arsenal
about.description: I specialize in end-to-end web deployment, bridging the gap between Figma designs and robust technical execution. My workflow leverages process automation (n8n), API integrations, and modern Docker-based environments (Dokploy, Nixpacks) to drive scalability and efficiency.

contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.description: Currently available for select freelance opportunities and full-time collaborations. Let's build something exceptional together.
